title: Waila [BTW Port]
body:
A fork of [WAILA-GTNH](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/waila) by [ProfMobius](https://github.com/ProfMobius) & [GTNH](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons).This fork is permitted under the [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/waila/blob/master/LICENSE) license.

Because it is a 1.7.10 Forge port to 1.6.4 LegacyFabric, none of the plugins/addons/compatibilities are compatible.

This fork is only compatible with BTWCE 3.x and not with 1.x & 2.x.

This mod depends on [ForgeConfig-LegacyFabric](https://github.com/ysesiq/ForgeConfig-LegacyFabric)

# Difference in Features & Exclusive Features
Numpad 3 and Numpad 4 are used in this fork to view recipes in retroEMI (BTWCE3.x).

The tooltip has animation effects.

Simple break progress bar.

Can show more information.
